theme_and_archetype.rationale: Medical and clinical genomics dashboards typically default to sterile, cold blues. E1 approach: Utilize an Organic & Earthy palette (bone-white, moss green, terracotta) to instill trust, calm, and grounded precision for clinicians and researchers analyzing high-stakes gene data.

hierarchy_rules.sequence_data: font-mono text-sm tracking-widest text-slate-800 whitespace-pre overflow-x-auto

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid - high density, structured for analytical scannability. Minimal shadows, strong 1px borders to separate dense genomic data streams.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden

sequence_alignment_viewer.classes: font-mono bg-muted p-4 md:p-6 rounded-md border border-border overflow-x-auto whitespace-pre text-sm tracking-widest
sequence_alignment_viewer.interaction: Highlight mutations dynamically with bg-[#F5E6E3] for pathogenic mutations or bg-[#E6EBE8] for benign, ensuring high contrast on focus.

risk_badge.high_risk: bg-[#F5E6E3] text-[#C16353] border border-[#EACCC8] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
risk_badge.low_risk: bg-[#E6EBE8] text-[#52745E] border border-[#CCD7D1] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

rag_evidence_card.classes: border-l-4 border-primary bg-card p-4 rounded-r-md shadow-sm mb-3 text-sm text-foreground
rag_evidence_card.header_classes: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground mb-2

tabs.override_classes: w-full justify-start border-b border-border bg-transparent p-0 mb-6
tabs.trigger_classes: data-[state=active]:bg-transparent data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-primary data-[state=active]:shadow-none rounded-none px-4 py-2

dashboard_abstract_pattern.description: Multi-colored dots pattern abstractly representing microarray genetic data. Use softly layered behind the hero or login section (opacity-10).

dna_visual.description: Abstract rendering of a DNA strand. Perfect for the AI explanation header banner or empty states.

clinical_context.description: Lab scientist context image, use for onboarding, about, or authentication screens.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design Philosophy: You are building a precision tool for clinicians. Keep layouts dense and functional (Control Room Grid). Do NOT use centered, airy layouts typical of marketing pages.
Data Test IDs: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tabs, and critical data containers MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="upload-sequence-btn"').
Typography: Use 'IBM Plex Mono' for the sequence alignment visualization. The 'A C T G' characters MUST align perfectly across rows. Do not use sans-serif for sequence strings.
Colors: Strictly map the 'shadcn_variables' provided above into your Tailwind/Shadcn CSS setup. This replaces the default black/white Vercel look with an organic, trusted medical palette.
Component Choice: Rely heavily on Shadcn 'Card', 'Tabs' (for switching between map, alignment, and evidence), 'Data Table' (for RAG results), and 'Badge' (for Risk).
Images: Exclusively use the URLs provided in 'media_urls'. Avoid any placeholder image services.
